windows.summary_v2: Factory footage of mass-produced jar candles moving on a conveyor and vast racks of candles curing on a candle-manufacturing floor.

seconds_v2.desc: Large glass jar candles filled with orange wax move along a factory conveyor; 'Yankee Candle' labels on the jars, warehouse racks behind; 'MAKING MAGIC' overlay top-left.
Row of amber Yankee Candle jars with set wicks travel down the conveyor line in the factory.
Filled orange jar candles continue along the roller conveyor past yellow factory stairs and racking.
Jar candles advance on the conveyor toward a metal guide rail; bright yellow handrails frame the production line.
Wide factory-floor view: long racks holding thousands of curing pillar/votive candles, overhead 'CONCENTRATOR EXHAUST' ducting, a worker walking a catwalk.
Vast candle factory hall with rows of colored candles cooling on trays; a person walks along the elevated yellow walkway.
Continued wide shot of the production floor, teal and red candles in racks, worker crossing the catwalk above.
Factory overview of curing candle racks and conveyors; a robotic arm/machine works at lower right, person on the walkway.
Wide candle-manufacturing floor, endless trays of candles cooling, overhead ducts and walkway with a distant worker.

windows.embed_text_v2: mixing molten wax in large stainless steel vat with rotating metal agitator shaft, churning frothy yellow amber liquid wax, industrial candle wax blending, foam swirls splashing
windows.summary_v2: An industrial mixer shaft stirs and agitates a large steel vat of molten yellow-amber wax to blend it.

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead view of a wide stainless steel vat filled with frothy yellow-amber molten wax, surface covered in foamy swirls as it is agitated.
Camera lowers to show the rim of the steel pot and a vertical metal mixing shaft entering the cloudy yellow liquid wax.
The metal stirring shaft is centered in the pot, churning the pale yellow molten wax; foam streaks ring the surface.
Continued mixing; the shaft rotates in the amber wax, green work surface and a rusty tray visible at the pot's edge.
Wider angle of the steel pot on a green table, mixing rod stirring the glossy yellow wax, a wooden scoop and crate beside it.
The agitator keeps turning the molten wax, surface glassy gold with light swirl marks, tools resting on the bench at right.
Closer top-down shot of the spinning mixer shaft cutting through the amber wax, creating a circular ripple and slight splash.
The mixer churns faster, throwing up bubbles and droplets as the golden wax is blended vigorously around the shaft.
Vigorous agitation continues with splashing wax around the rotating shaft; a lower-third caption reads 2,000 INDIVIDUAL SCENT COMPONENTS.

tags_v2.on_screen_text: MAKING MAGIC; YANKEE CANDLE; NEW; Christmas Memories

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up of a lit cream Yankee Candle jar with a glowing flame, a red 'NEW' band around the rim, festive holiday packaging behind.
Same lit jar candle burning steadily, branded 'YANKEE CANDLE' label visible, another jar and red gift box in the background.
The flame flickers on the finished jar candle; reflections in the glass and the red 'NEW' label remain prominent.
Continued shot of the burning Yankee Candle jar, flame steady, holiday-themed boxes and ribbon at right.
Camera tilts to a top-down view down into the jar candle, showing the lit wick in a pool of pale wax and a holiday figurine at right.
Overhead of the jar candle's surface with the single small flame at center, decorative snow-globe and ornaments nearby.
Top-down view holds on the lit wick and creamy wax pool inside the glass jar with the red rim band.
Still overhead of the burning candle, flame at center of the wax pool, festive decorations softly lit around it.
Wider shot of a retail display: three Yankee Candle jars (cream, snow-globe-topped, red 'Christmas Memories') arranged on a branded gift box.
